title: Pino 3
description: It is a tech orientated modpack with mods such as Create, Mekanism and Applied Energistics 2.
body:
The final verion of the modpack was uploaded! It won’t receive any further updates!

It is a modpack with over 230 mods.
It’s mainly about automating items and building farms with mods like Applied Energistics 2, Create, Mekanism and Immersive Engeneering.

With Applied Energistics 2 and Refined Storage you can build large storage systems, automate many items and more.
With Create and the addons for Create, you can build simple farms, e.g. a wheat farm.
But you can also build complicated factories with this mod, e.g. a strawberry ice cream factory.
With Mekanism you can, for example, build a simple smelting furnace or a complicated factory for increasing ore.
If you like building large factories to automate items, this is the perfect modpack for you.

Here is a tutorial on how to install Pino 3 as a server:

-> Download the installer for Neoforge 47.1.106.
-> Open the installer, click on Install server, set the file path where the server should be installed and click on proceed.
-> Open user_jvm_args.txt and remove # from the 9th line and replace the 4 with 8.
-> Copy the following folders from your modpack profile to the folder in which you previously installed the server: mods, config, defaultconfig, kubejs.
-> Open the mods folder and delete the following mods. These are only required for the client:
  • AdvancementPlaques-1.20.1-forge-1.6.7.jar
  • appleskin-forge-mc1.20.1-2.5.1.jar
  • BetterF3-7.0.2-Forge-1.20.1.jar
  • Controlling-forge-1.20.1-12.0.2.jar
  • create-train-perspective-1.0.0+mc1.20.1.jar
  • create_tab_fix-1.0.0+forge-1.20.1. jar
  • CullLessLeaves-Reforged-1.20.1-1.0.5.jar
  • dynamic-fps-3.7.7+minecraft-1.20.0-forge.jar
  • embeddium-0.3.31+mc1.20.1.jar
  • EnchantmentDescriptions-Forge-1. 20.1-17.1.19.jar
  • entity_model_features_forge_1.20.1-2.2.6.jar
  • entity_texture_features_forge_1.20.1-6.2.9.jar
  • entityculling-forge-1. 7.2-mc1.20.1.jar
  • essential_1-3-5-3_forge_1-20-1.jar
  • Fallingleaves-1.20.1-2.1.0.jar
  • fancymenu_forge_3.3.2_MC_1.20.1.jar
  • fusion-1. 1.1-forge-mc1.20.1.jar
  • jeimultiblocks-1.20.1-1.0.2.jar
  • journeymap-1.20.1-5.10.3-forge.jar
  • JustEnoughMekanismMultiblocks-1.20.1-4.6. jar
  • JustEnoughProfessions-forge-1.20.1-3.0.1.jar
  • melody_forge_1.0.3_MC_1.20.1-1.20.4.jar
  • modelfix-1.15.jar
  • notenoughcrashes-4.4.7+1.20. 1-forge.jar
  • oculus-mc1.20.1-1.7.0.jar
  • searchables-forge-1.20.1-1.0.3.jar
  • skinlayers3d-forge-1.7.4-mc1.20.1.jar
  • starlight-1.1.2+forge.1cda73c.jar

-> Execute the start.bat
-> After a short time eula.txt is created. Open it and replace “false” with “true”
-> Execute the start.bat again
-> Done! The server should now work.
